to happen like some people swimming they get annoyed when a kid's ball goes into their swim Lane
like they get angry at it actually and so because they're not moving in nature with it they're going
to be disappointed but if you always move in in harmony with the nature of the thing then when that
happens you simply just take the ball and you put it back into the other lane where the kid um is
